notes: Public aggregate package for research-use inspection of source-attributed gene-disease evidence records.

This patch release keeps candidate association content and archive layout stable relative to top120-public-preview-v0.1.2 and updates release citation metadata so CITATION.cff matches the current aggregate.
Not medical advice, diagnosis, treatment guidance, patient risk prediction, clinical decision support, clinical certainty, or a clinical-use dataset.
Paper-grade gates passed in the private pipeline; this does not imply manuscript acceptance, external peer review, or clinical validity.
